name: Blueprint
description: Technical blueprint aesthetics with grid lines and cyan drafting accents.

preview.sampleText: Drafted structure with measured spacing and engineering notes.

classes.h1: text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-cyan-100 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.h2: text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 text-cyan-200 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.h6: text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-cyan-300 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.th: border border-cyan-500/30 p-2 bg-[#19425f] text-cyan-100 text-left font-semibold
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-sky-300 pl-4 my-4 italic text-cyan-100/85 bg-[#102a3d]/80 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-[#14354c] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-cyan-100
classes.pre: bg-[#10283a] p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-cyan-500/30
